notes: v0.16.0 — CLASS page uses real ship textures for all 4 classes (tab + hero). OPEN SKILL TREE replaced by MODULES + COSMETICS buttons. MODULES slot click opens a centered UNEQUIP / CANCEL confirm (side-dock picker removed). COSMETICS SHIP tab now uses real ship textures in skin buttons; prices show PULSE / SURGE currency icons. Clicking a locked skin jumps to SHOP with the right class pre-selected. SHOP ship skins split into per-class subcategory + OWNED / PULSE SHOP / PREMIUM (SURGE only) sections. BOSS KEYS section now ships the real orange keycard art. Windows only.
